title: DISNEYLAND PARIS — Mom's lifelong dream, emotional payoff
prompt: @young_Papa standing center-left and @young_Mama center-right, both wearing iconic black mouse-ear headbands. Sleeping Beauty Castle in the background, golden-hour sky lit with soft fireworks. Hands HOLD between them. Eyes SLOWLY FILL with tears of joy from her, mouth OPENS in a soft gasp, hand COVERS her mouth. young_Mama (whispering): "I... I can't believe it..." Mouth SMILES adoringly from him, right arm WRAPS around her shoulders, head TILTS to rest on top of hers. young_Papa (soft): "It was always your dream. Today I made it come true."
